achievements.title: Code of the Saber
achievements.description: Hold B, Y, Right, and Select on the Atlus logo during start-up to unlock the secret menu - this will block ALL other achievements!
achievements.author: MeCKooLL

achievements.title: Running with Style
achievements.description: Cycle through every player palette by pressing Select while the game is paused
achievements.author: MeCKooLL

achievements.title: Fueled by Fusion
achievements.description: Collect 15 Red Balls on Normal difficulty or higher
achievements.author: MeCKooLL

achievements.title: Eight Units of Excellence
achievements.description: Max out your HP Life Gauge on Normal difficulty or higher
achievements.author: MeCKooLL

achievements.title: Put Some Flair into It
achievements.description: Score 200,000 points
achievements.author: MeCKooLL

achievements.title: Cyborg with a Conscience
achievements.description: Beat the game with a final score between 356,400 and 400,000 points
achievements.author: MeCKooLL

achievements.title: Stirring Thunder Dragon
achievements.description: Collect a Sword power-up as Allen

achievements.title: Forming Ice Cyclone
achievements.description: Collect a Sword power-up as Sheena

achievements.title: Remnants of the Renaissance Project
achievements.description: Defeat Beautiful and clear Stage 1: Taj Base on Normal difficulty

achievements.title: Mining Capital of Punishment

achievements.title: Thunder Saber's Fury
achievements.description: Thwart Dr. Bruford's plans in Stage 5 and beat the game as Allen

achievements.description: Thwart Dr. Bruford's plans in Stage 5 and beat the game as Sheena

achievements.title: Pup Amongst Parasites
achievements.description: Beat the game on Easy difficulty

achievements.title: Dr. Bruford's Bane
achievements.description: Beat the game on Normal difficulty

achievements.title: Savior of the 30th Century

achievements.title: Run Sabers Reign Supreme
